title: Valve
description: Valve: A device used to control the flow within a piping system (ball valve, check valve, etc.)

OrientationAngle.description: Controls the local plan orientation of the object. Property has a quantity of type Angle meassured in [rad].

PressureDrop.description: The difference in total pressure between two points of a fluid carrying network. Property has a quantity of type Pressure meassured in [Pa].

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
